name: Milestone 1 — Daily Script Generation + WhatsApp Gate

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Fires daily at 07:00 UTC. Adjust timezone offset in n8n settings.

nodes.name: Get Rotating Schedule

string.name: brand_guidelines
string.value: Your brand voice: conversational, energetic, DTC-focused. Always open with a problem or hook. CTA: link in bio.

nodes.notes: Rotates content themes Mon-Fri. Swap in your actual brand guidelines here.

nodes.name: Claude — Generate Script

body.system: You are a video script writer for a DTC e-commerce brand. Brand guidelines: {{ $node['Get Rotating Schedule'].json.brand_guidelines }}. Write scripts optimized for {{ $node['Get Rotating Schedule'].json.target_platforms }}.

messages.content: Write a 45-second video script for today's theme: {{ $node['Get Rotating Schedule'].json.content_theme }}. Structure: HOOK (0-3s, grab attention immediately), BODY (3-35s, deliver value with B-roll cues in [brackets]), CTA (35-45s). Output JSON: { hook, body, cta, broll_tags: [], caption, duration_seconds }.

nodes.notes: Replace ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in n8n Credentials. Model can be swapped to gpt-4o.

nodes.name: WhatsApp — Send Script for Approval
nodes.notes: Set WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID, WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN, OWNER_PHONE_NUMBER in n8n env.

nodes.name: WhatsApp Webhook
nodes.notes: Register this webhook URL in Meta Developer Console as your WhatsApp webhook.

nodes.name: Set Approved Script
nodes.notes: Approved — pass script data to Milestone 2 trigger.

body.system: You are a video script writer for a DTC e-commerce brand.

messages.content: ={{ $json.entry?.[0]?.changes?.[0]?.value?.messages?.[0]?.text?.body ?? 'Please revise the script and try again.' }}
